metadata.description: Private skill marketplace for Flagrant and partner clients

plugins.name: adr
plugins.description: Write an Architecture Decision Record (ADR), or advise whether a decision warrants one. Use when the user says "write an ADR", "record this decision", "is this ADR-worthy?", or is making a choice affecting structure, dependencies, interfaces, or construction techniques.

plugins.name: commit-message-guide
plugins.description: "Guide for creating well-structured conventional commits. TRIGGER when: about to run `git commit`, user asks to commit or save changes to git, or drafting/reviewing a commit message. Use for single logical changes. Enforces conventional commit format, forbids AI attribution and Co-Authored-By trailers."

plugins.name: rspec-discipline
plugins.description: RSpec test selection and code review for Rails + ADR workflows. Trigger on "write specs", "review this test", "review this code", or when implementing an ADR.
